title: rubus × czornebogensis
intro:
Rubus × czornebogensis, also known as the blackthorn hybrid, is a cross between the common blackthorn (Prunus spinosa) and the raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a unique shrub that combines the characteristics of both parent plants.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of ellagic acid, a potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compound that has been shown to possess anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Rubus × czornebogensis include its ability to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and jams, which are used to treat various ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
